title: VeloraOS 1.10.2 - Public Beta Models Logo Hotfix
releaseNotes: Fixes the Models card on the VeloraOS homepage so its logo no longer renders as undefined.
Keeps both Chat and Models available during public beta.
Keeps Image Studio, Video Studio and Upgrades marked as coming soon.
Preserves accounts, chats, settings, licensing, device identity and secure rollback updates.
